title: SENIOR PORTABLE AC - 211info
text: TIGARD MULTI-SERVICE CENTER SENIOR PORTABLE AC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers portable air conditioning units. Limited to one unit per household. Households are responsible for installing the units themselves. 11515 SW Durham Road Suite E8 Tigard, OR 97224 Eligibility: -Age 62 and older -Household income is at or below 60% of Oregon's Area Median Income (AMI) over the past 30 days -Have not received an AC from Community Action in the past 2 years Hours: -Apply by Monday, August 31, 2025 -Phone: Monday-Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-4pm, closed national holidays Email (503) 615-0771 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (503) 615-0771 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website. Apply online. Call for questions or assistance. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Identification and income for all adults in the household age 18 and older LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Arabic, interpretation by arrangement. Online application available in English and Spanish. AREA SERVED: Washington County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus line 94 Services: Air Conditioners * Older Adults Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EARLY HEAD START EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - HEAD START HOUSING/SHELTER - COMMUNITY CONNECT HOUSING/SHELTER - HOUSING REPAIR ASSISTANCE FOR BEAVERTON RESIDENTS HOUSING/SHELTER - WEATHERIZATION AND ENERGY CONSERVATION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HEALTHY FAMILIES OREGON INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HOUSING FAMILY ADVOCACY PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SUPPORTIVE SERVICES FOR VETERAN FAMILIES MONEY MANAGEMENT - FINANCIAL EDUCATION CLASSES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. TIGARD MULTI-SERVICE CENTER
